title: Voxel Lobby Drop
description: Drag a tiny voxel server under falling player-cubes to assemble live multiplayer rooms before lag ghosts crash your engine.

howToPlayJson.title: Voxel Lobby Drop
howToPlayJson.objective: On a vertical mobile screen, slide a catcher left and right to collect the exact falling voxel players your current room needs while avoiding decoy cubes, overflow junk, and lag ghosts for a 2-4 minute high-score run.

controls.input: Drag left or right with one thumb anywhere on the lower half of the screen
controls.outcome: The basket glides across three wide lanes to catch or dodge falling voxels
The basket snaps to that lane for precise last-second catches

controls.input: Double-tap while combo meter is lit
controls.outcome: Spend part of the combo meter to magnet-pull one nearby wanted voxel into the basket

steps: A run starts with a room order shown above the basket, such as 'Need 2 blue builders' or 'Need 1 red runner + 1 yellow scout.'
Wanted voxel players fall from the top in chunky cubes; catch only the ones that match the current room order.
Complete a room to bank points, raise your combo, and immediately receive the next multiplayer room request.
Decoy cubes also fall: lag ghosts break combo, duplicate players overfill the room buffer, and dead-pixel junk costs one shield if caught.
Every few seconds a readable twist fires: a Host Swap pulse flips the active order from 'invite' to 'kick,' so for a short window you must s
Catch wanted voxels in sequence to build a combo multiplier up to x8. Completing a room quickly adds a speed bonus, perfect room fills add a
howToPlayJson.scoring: Catch wanted voxels in sequence to build a combo multiplier up to x8. Completing a room quickly adds a speed bonus, perfect room fills add a 'clean sync' bonus, and surviving Host Swap windows without mistakes grants a '
tips: Stay near the center lane before a new room order appears so either side is reachable with one thumb.
During Host Swap, read the basket banner first; the correct choice changes for only a few seconds.
Use the combo burn only to save a nearly complete room, because spending it slows multiplier growth.
